metadata.source_authority: Ministry of Gender, Children and Social Protection
metadata.source_note: Official MoGCSP announcement of the 97th LEAP payment cycle (published 4 August 2025, covering the May-June 2025 bi-monthly grants plus arrears of the 25% June-2025 indexation). States the per-cycle grant amounts by number of eligible household members: GH¢320 / GH¢380 / GH¢440 / GH¢530 for one / two / three / four or more members, paid bi-monthly.
metadata.title: MoGCSP — 97th LEAP payment cycle announcement (bi-monthly grant amounts, June 2025 indexation)

metadata.source_authority: Ministry of Finance (Budget Statement presented to Parliament)
metadata.source_note: Pages 83-84 of the 2025 Budget Statement and Economic Policy (text-embedded PDF on the Ministry of Finance site). Paragraph 381 states the School Feeding Programme "feeding cost per meal per child per day from GH¢1.50 to GH¢2.00"; paragraph 386 states the LEAP inflation indexation, the 350,000 to 400,000 household expansion from July 2025 and the GH¢728.8m to GH¢953.5m allocation increase.
metadata.title: 2025 Budget Statement and Economic Policy — school feeding and LEAP paragraphs (pp. 83-84)
